title: Theme manifest
description: Contract for a theme.yaml: the manifest that makes a theme a portable, ownable design bundle. Validated on load so a typo'd key fails clearly instead of being silently ignored.

name.description: Theme identifier (the slug a book selects with `theme: <name>`). The only required field.

title.description: Human-facing display name for galleries/listings (defaults to `name`).

description.description: One-line description of the theme's look.

version.description: Theme version (semver recommended), independent of the ladle core version.

license.description: License for the theme's design assets (CSS/templates/patterns), distinct from any embedded font licenses.

tags.description: Mood/style/use-case tags for gallery filtering (e.g. [warm, rustic, serif]).

preview.description: Path (relative to this theme dir) to a generated preview image used by the gallery.

palette.description: Default design-token colours (name -> hex); a book.yaml overrides any key.

fonts.description: Default font-family roles (role -> family name); a book.yaml overrides any key.

font_faces.description: Font files embedded in the PDF (@font-face) and EPUB.

family.description: CSS font-family name this file provides.

file.description: Font file under this theme's fonts/ directory.

style.description: Font style this face covers (default: normal).

fonts_meta.description: License provenance per embedded font family (name/license/source).

source.description: Where the font was obtained (URL or foundry).
